channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Emerson Poll: Buttigieg and Newsom Lead Crowded 2028 Democratic Field
item.description: Former Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg and California Governor Gavin Newsom are early frontrunners in a crowded Democratic primary for 2028.

item.title: Redistricting Conflict Escalates as GOP Faces Setbacks in Two States
item.description: House Republicans encounter minor redistricting losses in Alabama and South Carolina but maintain a strong overall position in the midterm battle.

item.title: Republicans Prepare for Costly Texas Senate Race
item.description: Republicans worry that Attorney General Ken Paxton's win in the Texas GOP Senate runoff could force the party to redirect significant resources.

item.title: Trump Accuser E. Jean Carroll Faces DOJ Investigation
